si.t: The score/rank needed to enter the Top 8.
Automated logic comparing semi-final losers' scores.
The goal here is to reward the highest seeds by matching them with the lowest seeds.
The winners advance to face each other. Based on your specific request, the bracket flows as follows:
Match 5 (M5): Winner M1 vs. Winner M2
Match 6 (M6): Winner M3 vs. Winner M4
Championship Match: Winner M5 vs. Winner M6
Compare the scores of the two losers from the Semi-Finals (Loser M5 and Loser M6).
Rule: Higher total pinfall (best score) between the two earns the 3rd Place trophy.
